title: Al-Fa41 b. YaI ya's Governorship in Khurasan and the Poetic Eulogies of Him
description: Al-Fa41 b. YaI ya's Governorship in Khurasan and the Poetic Eulogies of Him. Recorded under the year 178 AH (794–795 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 30.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
